title: 5 Hour Energy
description: It's not a drink, more like a drink.
body:
![The greatest mod ever made](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9818349d0e23e8b188cea48987e44194daa30482.png)
# Made for [ModFest 1.21](https://modfest.net/1.21)!!!

This mod adds 5 hour energy that makes you energerised in Mined craft!!!!
The energy when obtained will last 5 hours, giving you speeeeeeeeeeeed, but can be cancelled out with 5 hour sleep, which will happen by sleeping, or drinking 5 hour sleep.

# QnA
## Q: Give me 1.20.1 PLSLLSSSLSLSLSLSLSL
A: Card declined.

## Q: Pls update to the latest version snapshot terraria
A: ![Card Declined.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7cbca41d79933ea3a283899a1fc02d08cc2f211_0.webp)
